attributes.action: Give all security officers some form of physical and legal protection.
attributes.additional_details: Security are often first responders to incidents of crime and violence yet I feel they get little physical or legal protection, leaving them vulnerable. A dedicated offence and some sort of physical protection i.e baton or pepper spray and appropriate training for said equipment could serve as a deterrent and an acknowledgment of their role in protecting public safety. We would want legal protections in line with those for emergency and retail staff.
attributes.background: Security workers play a vital role in maintaining public safety, but can face violence and abuse while performing their duties. Despite their critical role in protecting businesses, venues, and the public, security workers lack the legal or physical protections given to emergency workers.

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign these petitions, which call for similar action: 

"Make assaulting a security worker a standalone offence" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/750121

"Allow SIA trained persons to carry CS/PAVA spray and ASP/ARNOLD batons" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/749421
